name: Live Aid at 40: When Rock ’n’ Roll Took on the World
original_name: Live Aid at 40: When Rock ’n’ Roll Took on the World
overview: A look at the legacy of Band Aid, Live Aid and Live 8 in reshaping global charity and politics. Featuring interviews with Bob Geldof, Bono, Sting, and African and western leaders of the time.

trailers.title: BBC Two - Trailer - Live Aid at 40: When Rock'n'Roll Took on the World
